summary: Full E2E validation of MobileNetV2 anemia screening pipeline. Backend: 20/20 pytest tests PASS (health, auth, admin/models, admin/export zip + token auth, screenings CRUD with engine='mobilenetv2', real Grad-CAM payloads, 6-class nail probs summing to ~1, fusion strategies noisy-or + eye-only + nail-only, blurry image quality.passed=false). Frontend: all critical flows PASS — landing, login (admin), screening upload (both eye+nail), redirect to /results, 3 RiskCards (eye/nail/fusion), two real Grad-CAM heatmaps with data:image/png, 'Grad-CAM · CNN' badge, all 6 nail classes rendered with anemia-positive markers, history list refresh (no stale cache regression), View report navigation, logout clears token, non-admin sees 'Admin only' fallback on /admin/models, Models admin shows both 'Loaded' badges and 'Download codebase' button opens /api/admin/export?token=... URL. Toast no longer overlaps nav (top-right position).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: CORS still uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False — cookie auth won't flow cross-origin. App relies on Bearer token in localStorage which works fine; acceptable for demo prototype.

server.py /api/admin/export streams the full /app tree zipped in memory (32MB+). For larger codebases this could spike memory; consider zipfile.ZipFile(target_path) on disk + FileResponse for very large exports.
server.py: still no brute-force lockout / rate limiting on /api/auth/login. Demo-acceptable.
Screenings store full base64 images in MongoDB documents — could push docs past 16MB for high-res inputs. Consider GridFS / object storage for production.
MobileNetV2 inference is ~4-6s per image due to 5-variant TTA — fine, but no async cancellation if user navigates away from /screen mid-analysis.

Models admin codebase download: window.open(url) opens a new tab where the browser receives a fresh GET with ?token=... in the URL — the token is logged in browser history & access logs. Acceptable for an internal/demo admin tool, but in production prefer a short-lived signed download URL.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@anemiacheck.app / Admin@123 (verified). Random TEST_uitest_*@example.com non-admin users registered for 403 checks.
seed_data_creation: pytest auto-creates ~3 TEST_-prefixed users via /api/auth/register and several screenings that are cleaned up via DELETE inside the same test functions (eye-only, nail-only, blurry). One screening is intentionally left for the list/get tests then deleted at end. Playwright flow created 1 admin screening + 1 non-admin TEST_uitest user (not cleaned up — minor, prefix='TEST_').
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_anemia_backend.py — 20 tests, ~65s wall-clock. Requires REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var (run with: cd /app/backend/tests && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) python -m pytest -v). Models loaded check: /api/admin/models with admin Bearer token returns eye_loaded=true, nail_loaded=true, sizes 22.52MB & 11.01MB. Screening endpoint takes ~25-35s with both images due to TTA — use 120s+ timeout. Grad-CAM target layers: eye='mobilenetv2_1.00_224' (nested Sequential), nail='Conv_1' (inlined). Nail anemia-positive classes = {blue_finger, clubbing, pitting} per config.NAIL_ANEMIA_POSITIVE. Fusion strategies: 'noisy-or + conf-avg' (both modalities), 'eye-only', 'nail-only'. The /api/admin/export endpoint supports both Bearer header AND ?token=<jwt> query param for download links opened in new tab.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in this iteration. Previous iteration's two issues (toast overlapping nav + History stale cache) are both resolved — toast now sits top-right and history-list updates immediately after creating a new screening from /screen.
